name: Quick Chicken Piroshki
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. In a large frying pan, melt margarine over medium heat. Add shallots and garlic and cook until tender, but not brown, about 2 minutes. Stir in chicken, rice, parsley, thyme, salt, and pepper to taste.
2. Separate Crescent rolls into 8 squares; seal the line in each square. Divide chicken mixture evenly among squares, fold to make a triangle shape, and seal edges. Prick tops of pastry with fork, and brush with egg. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet for 15 minutes until golden brown. Remove to a serving platter and keep warm until ready to serve.
